sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sequences (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, seq_value BIGINT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, seq_value, created_at FROM test_sequences WHERE seq_value > (SELECT get_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201') - 5);
CREATE TABLE time_test (event_time TIMESTAMPTZ, event_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO time_test (event_time, event_name) VALUES (time(3) with time zone '18:40:05.123+02:00', 'Fuzz Event 1'), (time(3) with time zone '23:59:59.999+05:30', 'Fuzz Event 2');
SELECT event_name, event_time, get_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201') AS current_seq FROM time_test WHERE event_time > (time(3) with time zone '12:00:00.000+00:00');
SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) FROM time_test GROUP BY event_name HAVING COUNT(*) = get_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201') OR event_time IS NULL;
SELECT t.event_name, t.event_time FROM time_test t JOIN test_sequences s ON t.event_time::time = time(3) with time zone '10:30:00.000+01:00' WHERE s.seq_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.event_time DESC;
SELECT event_name, get_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201') + 10 AS adjusted_value FROM time_test WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;

SELECT seq_value, MAX(event_time) OVER (PARTITION BY event_name) AS max_event_time FROM time_test JOIN test_sequences ON test_sequences.id = get_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201') HAVING MAX(event_time) < time(3) with time zone '21:30:00.000+00:00';
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_events (event_time TIMESTAMPTZ, event_type VARCHAR(30), seq_num BIGINT);

INSERT INTO temp_events (event_time, event_type, seq_num) VALUES (time(3) with time zone '09:00:00.000+00:00', 'Type A', get_value_for('dwh2', 'seq_9201')), (time(3) with time zone '14:15:30.123+00:00', 'Type B', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_events WHERE seq_num IS NULL OR event_type ILIKE '%A%';
